items.name: Product Hit
items.prompt: Object flies into frame, hits subject. Brief reaction → pivot to product.

items.name: Random Object Mic
items.prompt: During a casual vlog, a random absurd object falls into the person's hand from above, and they immediately use it as a microphone to continue a completely serious product review.

items.name: Blizzard
items.prompt: A cozy indoor scene is suddenly hit by a violent, impossible blizzard; chaos fills the room but the product remains intact and functioning, and once the storm stops, the product is still working.

items.name: Product Dodge
items.prompt: Suddenly, a product flies into a person's face; he quickly bends down to avoid a collision, and in the next frame he stands up straight and already holds the product in his hands and begins to review as if nothing had happened.
